Intent: Show every user and completed order total, including users with zero completed total.

Broken query:
SELECT u.name, COALESCE(SUM(o.amount), 0) AS completed_total FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.name

ground_truth: SELECT u.name, COALESCE(SUM(o.amount), 0) AS completed_total FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.name

Intent: Show every product and completed item revenue, including products with zero completed revenue.

Broken query:
SELECT p.name, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 0) AS completed_revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.id, p.name

ground_truth: SELECT p.name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'completed' THEN oi.quantity * oi.unit_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed_revenue FROM products p LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name
